name: kuat
description: Equal Experts brand & design-system plugins (Kuat). beta + stable channels.

metadata.note: PLACEHOLDER repo coords — confirm before publishing. Plugin payloads are built and committed in EqualExperts/kuat-agent-rules under plugins/<name>/ and pulled via git-subdir. Channels differ by ref: 'stable' (release tag) vs 'beta' (pre-release branch). Version comes from each ref's plugin.json — do NOT set version on the entries (same string on two refs => /plugin update skips).

plugins.name: kuat-build
plugins.description: EE web app UI — build & review. For engineers in Claude Code / Cowork.

plugins.name: kuat-studio
plugins.description: EE slide decks, presentations & imagery — create & review.

plugins.name: kuat-build-beta
plugins.description: Beta channel of kuat-build for the pilot cohort.

plugins.name: kuat-studio-beta
plugins.description: Beta channel of kuat-studio for the pilot cohort.
